questions.question: Explain ThreadPool Executor to a junior developer.
questions.answer: Start with the problem it solves, show a simple example, explain core concepts, and discuss common mistakes.
questions.followUp: What mistakes do developers make with this?

questions.question: Real-world scenario for threadpool executor?
questions.answer: Use ThreadPool Executor when you encounter the programming problem it addresses.
